Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reasoning: The course includes a dedicated section on 'Vietnam Transportation' (Weeks 14-15), which is a direct component of infrastructure development (Target 9.1).

Life on Land.reasoning: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus relates to terrestrial ecosystems, biodiversity, or land degradation.
